title: Howmet (HWM) Q1 Earnings Beat, Surge Y/Y on Higher Revenues
text: Howmet's (HWM) Q1 results benefit from strength in the commercial aerospace, defense aerospace, industrial gas turbine, and oil and gas markets.

title: Howmet (HWM) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Howmet (HWM) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.42 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.38 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.31 per share a year ago.
